reason: The remediation only edits NetworkManager configuration files to set the DNS mode. This is a straightforward text substitution that does not affect authentication, bootloader, or filesystem structures. While an incorrect DNS mode could temporarily disrupt name resolution, it will not lock out SSH or console access, and the change can be reverted easily.
estimated_impact: networking affected; Potential loss of DNS resolution if an invalid mode is set; Network connectivity issues until NetworkManager is restarted
